title: centaurea boissieri var. mariolensis
intro: Centaurea boissieri var. mariolensis is a variant of the Centaurea boissieri plant, a type of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Centaurea boissieri var. mariolensis is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can also be used to make salves and creams for topical application.
